description: Data spec for Dreamland, the bedtime feature that gently encourages Efya to sleep in her own bed all night. Based on positive reinforcement: a calming wind-down (lullaby + affirmations) and a morning star chart. This is the readable data spec; the app reads the runtime mirror in content.js. Affirmations lean on Efya's own personality so her traits become the reason she can do this.

stars.meaning: strength — strong and brave like a ram
you are safe and watched over
nothing to fear in the dark

affirmations: Efya is brave. Her own bed is a cozy adventure ship sailing to morning.
Efya is strong and can do hard things, all by herself.
Efya snuggles under her soft pink blanket.
Efya's room is calm and safe. The stars are watching over her.
If Efya wakes up, she gives her pillow a squeeze and stays in her own big-girl bed.
In the morning, the sun says good morning and Efya earns a star.
Good night, brave girl. Da yie — sleep well.
morningCheers: You stayed in your own bed all night. You are so strong!
Here is your Adinkra star. You earned it.
Fawohodie — you did it all by yourself!

streakCheers.3: Three nights in a row! Efya is a Dreamland champion!
streakCheers.5: Five stars! Your sleep chart is shining!
streakCheers.7: A whole week of stars! Efya sleeps in her own bed like a big girl!
